description: Risk Map: cross-asset dispersion — what's booming (risk-on) vs getting destroyed (risk-off) across ~38 sleeves (equity breadth/size/style, 11 sectors, factors, crypto, rates/credit, commodities/havens, intl) + regime classifier (broad/narrow/bifurcated). data/regime-map.json.

schedule.description: 13:00 + 21:00 UTC daily (pre-open + post-close; crypto runs weekends too)
